function.name: review_code_against_spec
function.description: Compare implemented code against the original Planner spec or task description. Identify mismatches, bugs, edge cases, or improvements. Output a structured list of findings with severity and repro steps.

spec_description.description: Original feature/mechanic spec from Planner (e.g., 'Player jump: 3 units high, coyote 0.1s, no double-jump, SPACE key')

code_snippet.description: The code implementation to review (full file or relevant section)

function.name: test_mechanic_feedback
function.description: Analyze test results, debug output, or manual playtest notes. Flag failures, unexpected behavior, or feel issues (e.g., 'floaty jump'). Suggest next steps or refinements.

test_results.description: Output from unit tests, debug prints, or playtest log (e.g., 'Jump height measured: 2.8 units instead of 3; lands with delay')

mechanic_focus.description: What was being tested (e.g., 'player jump with coyote time')

function.name: bug_report_structured
function.description: Compile a clear bug/issue report from findings. Include title, severity (low/medium/high/critical), repro steps, expected vs actual, impact on gameplay, and suggested fix direction (no code).

suggested_fix.description: High-level advice for Coder, no code

function.name: balance_and_fun_check
function.description: Evaluate gameplay feel, balance, or fun factor from code/tests/notes (e.g., 'Enemy too hard', 'Pacing slow'). Flag non-technical issues and recommend tweaks to Planner.

gameplay_notes.description: Playtest observations or sim results (e.g., 'Player dies in 5s on first enemy wave')

function.name: scope_and_quality_gate
function.description: Final milestone check: Does this pass for the current phase? Approve, conditional pass (minor issues), or reject with blockers. Output verdict + rationale.
